title: Question: how does preview mode avoid changing GitHub issues?
body: I want to understand whether running the tool can edit labels or comments.
author: maintainer-a

comments.author: maintainer-a
comments.body: Preview output should be local only.

title: Bug: invalid model JSON should not reach apply mode
body: A malformed provider response should become human review instead of a public action.
author: maintainer-b

title: Question: where is preview mode enforced in the source code?
body: I want to understand the code path and function that keeps preview runs from changing GitHub issues.
author: maintainer-c

title: Reproduction: NPU install environment failure
body: Can the agent reproduce this dependency failure on an NPU environment with CUDA compatibility packages installed?
author: maintainer-d

title: Roadmap: close preview follow-up
body: This roadmap item is old but still useful for contributors. Active work is linked in https://github.com/Kirrito-k423/issue-agent/pull/77 and should not be closed only because of age.
author: maintainer-e

comments.author: contributor-a
comments.body: I am still working on this in Kirrito-k423/issue-agent#77.

title: Bug: missing reproduction logs
body: The report cannot move forward until the author provides reproduction logs. See #2 for the requested diagnostic template.
author: maintainer-f

comments.author: maintainer-a
comments.body: Please provide reproduction logs and environment details before we can continue; see #2 for the template.
